message:
feat(widgets,harness): adaptive radix tree widget and expanded E2E conformance coverage

Add adaptive_radix module implementing a cache-oblivious adaptive radix
tree (ART) data structure for high-performance widget key lookups and
prefix-based traversal. This supplements the choreographic programming
and van Emde Boas layout features with a fast associative container
optimized for string-keyed widget registries.

Expand E2E test coverage with two new comprehensive test suites:
- e2e_conformance_suite: systematic conformance matrix validating
  widget rendering, input handling, and state transitions across
  multiple terminal emulator profiles
- e2e_galaxy_brain_scenario: complex multi-widget interaction scenarios
  testing choreographic coordination, adaptive layout rebalancing, and
  edge cases in widget lifecycle management

Update beads issue tracking with current sprint status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
